mapper.select: SELECT 1 FROM ITEM WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} FOR UPDATE

SELECT CASE WHEN bidCount <= 1 THEN (SELECT START_PRICE FROM ITEM WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo}) ELSE ( SELECT BID_PRICE FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, BID_PRICE FROM ( SELECT BID_PRICE FROM BID WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} ORDER BY BID_PRICE DESC ) ) WHERE rn = 2 ) END AS CURRENT_PRICE FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS bidCount FROM BID WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BID ( BID_NO, ITEM_NO, USER_NO, BID_PRICE, BID_TIME ) VALUES ( SEQ_BID_NO.NEXTVAL, #{itemNo}, #{userNo}, #{bidPrice}, SYSDATE )
